title: Can you tell me — новые слова

items.example: I borrowed this book from the library.
We had lunch at the school cafeteria.
Please check in at the reception.
There's a sports centre with a swimming pool.
The car park is behind the building.
Please have a seat in the waiting room.
Take the lift to the fifth floor.
Excuse me, where is the restroom?
The entrance is on the left side of the building.
In case of fire, use the emergency exit.
